caption:
Ready to carry a burst of spring wherever you go?

These vibrant days on the islands are calling for colors that match the blooming energy around us. Our new Épice bags, each with a clever little interior pouch, are here to hold your essentials and your brightest moods. Let’s step into this fresh season together, with a pop of joy on our shoulders.

Bags: @epiceparis
